content:
🔥 davinci-resolve-mcp | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable AI assistants to control and automate post-production workflows within DaVinci Resolve through natural language commands.
✨ Key Features: • Complete coverage of DaVinci Resolve Scripting API • Integration with AI assistants (Claude, Cursor, Windsurf) • 30 context-efficient tools for post-production control • Guarded kernel workflows for safe operations (probing, reporting, dry-runs)
📖 Summary: This Python-based MCP server provides comprehensive integration with the DaVinci Resolve Scripting API, enabling AI assistants to control post-production workflows. It offers 30 context-efficient tools for tasks like timeline editing, media management, rendering, and color grading.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
